sentences.english: We're getting married in June and we're looking for a venue that can hold about a hundred and fifty guests.
sentences.korean: 6월에 결혼하는데 약 150명 수용 가능한 장소를 찾고 있어요.

sentences.english: Congratulations! Our main hall can accommodate up to two hundred guests, so it would be perfect for your size.
sentences.korean: 축하드려요! 메인 홀이 최대 200명까지 수용 가능해서 규모에 딱 맞을 거예요.

sentences.english: Yes, our all-inclusive package covers the venue, catering for up to two hundred guests, a DJ, floral arrangements, and a wedding coordinator.
sentences.korean: 네, 올인클루시브 패키지에 장소 200명 케이터링 DJ 꽃 장식 웨딩 코디네이터가 포함돼요.

sentences.english: How much is the all-inclusive package?
For a Saturday in June, it starts at twenty-five thousand, and we require a thirty percent deposit to secure the date.
sentences.korean: 6월 토요일의 경우 2만 5천 달러부터 시작하고 날짜 확보를 위해 30% 보증금이 필요합니다.

sentences.english: Can we see the hall and taste the menu before making a decision?
sentences.korean: 결정하기 전에 홀을 보고 메뉴를 시식할 수 있나요?

sentences.english: Of course, I can schedule a tasting session and a full tour for you this weekend.
sentences.korean: 물론이죠, 이번 주말에 시식과 전체 투어를 잡아드릴 수 있어요.
